The '''Gorum''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with prehensile tails. They used these tails to hang from [[Tree/Legends|trees]] when they went to sleep. They had large [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and forked tongues which could suck fluids from [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]]. [[Tormey]] was a member of this species.

{{Species-stub}}
